landing_card.title: Tröndelag
landing_card.subtitle: R7 regional pilot
landing_card.description: Active pilot with R7/R6/R5 only and explicit 250 m population-grid proxy semantics.

constraints: Do not expose R8/R9 in the interactive app.
Use EPSG:25832 for native Trondelag geometry work.
Population and settlement buffers use dissolved polygon buffers from the 250 m grid/centroid proxy.
readiness_requirements: R7/R6/R5 display counts validate before enabling full runtime.
LT01-LT09 landscape types validate, including LT09.
250 m population-grid proxy label remains visible in metadata and UI.
runtime_note: Trondelag is active, but this slim repo starts with file-fallback paths until the reviewed R7/R6/R5 display and LABLAB landscape runtime imports are available in SpeedLocal Postgres.
